sections.title: Talking to him or attempting to open the door to the long hall backstage

lines.speaker: Longhall bouncer
lines.text: Hey, outerlander. You can't go through there. Talent only, backstage.

lines.speaker: Longhall Bouncer
lines.text: You can't go through there. Talent only, backstage.

lines.speaker: Longhall Bouncer
lines.text: No you're not. I saw your performance. I was paid well to keep you from ever setting foot on stage here again.
